column2: These are optional souls that you can include in a game as extra goals to fulfill. Three of them are placed face up at the beginning of a game.

The first player to

(+1 soul)

The first player to
have 10 or more loot
cards in their hand
gains this soul.

(+1 soul)

The first time a player
controls their 3rd soul,
the active player chooses a
player who controls the
fewest souls or tied for
fewest. That player
gains this soul.

(+1 soul)

Each time a player dies,
put a counter on this.
------------------------------
When the 6th counter
is put on this, the
active player
gains this soul.

(+1 soul)

The first time a player

fewest. That player
